case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. BENJAMIN LEOPOLDO CARRANZA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARILYN NITA--LEGAL SERVICES SUPERVISOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C. HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-24-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506; JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
